subtitle: 尤运宁
headline: iOS & Agent Developer
bioMarkdown:
Hi, I'm Yunning👋. I'm an iOS Developer and Agent Developer based in Wuhan, China.

I'm currently working at Wuhan Duobite Technology as an iOS & Agent Developer. Previously, I worked as a Java Developer at Wuhan Rural Commercial Bank, and completed internships at Tencent and Yonyou.

I hold a Master's degree from China University of Geosciences (Wuhan) and a Bachelor's degree from Wuhan Textile University.

🔬 **Focus:** iOS Development, AI Agent Development, Java Backend Development.
blogTagline: Thoughts on AI, software, life and more. Short notes and longer write-ups.
